response: Prior to producing *Nine Days that Changed the World*, Newt Gingrich was the speaker of the U.S. House of Representatives and a political consultant, working closely with former U.S. Representative and Speaker of the House Newt Gingrich. He was also the executive director of the National Republican Congressional Committee and worked for GOPAC, a political action committee that played a key role in the 1994 Republican takeover of the U.S. Congress.
